name: Entenmann's Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Spray an 8-1/2" Pyrex loaf dish with Pam cooking spray.
3. Cream butter and powdered sugar in high speed of a mixer for 5 minutes.
4. Add 1 egg, then add a little flour, beating until well combined.
5. Add 2nd egg and half the remaining flour, beating until well combined.
6. Add 3rd egg, rest of the flour, and extract, beating until well combined.
7. Spread thick and creamy batter evenly in prepared loaf dish.
8. Bake for 65 minutes or until a tester inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Cool in baking dish on a wire rack for 30 minutes.
10. Remove cake from the dish and slice 1/2" thick.
11. If freezing, be sure to slice before freezing the loaf. Thaw at room temperature within 6 months before use.
